nodes.label: Model Providers Configuration
nodes.rationale: Declares available inference backends. Ollama is enabled by default (local HTTP API at port 11434); llama.cpp is defined but disabled, indicating planned but not-yet-active support.

nodes.label: Ollama Model Provider
nodes.rationale: Ollama is the primary enabled inference backend, accessed via local HTTP API at 127.0.0.1:11434. Chosen for local-first operation with no cloud dependency.

nodes.label: llama.cpp Model Provider
nodes.rationale: llama.cpp is defined as a second inference backend at 127.0.0.1:8080 but is disabled by default. Presence in config signals planned multi-backend support.

nodes.label: Local-First Architecture Principle
nodes.rationale: All inference runs locally (Ollama or llama.cpp on loopback). No data leaves the machine by default, satisfying privacy and offline-use requirements.
